name: AudioValley SA
summary: AudioValley SA engages in the digital audio business worldwide. It operates Radionomy, a free platform that allows radio enthusiasts to broadcast, promote, and monetize their radio; Storever, an international agency offering instore solutions for brands covering music services, digital signage, interactive solutions, and audiovisual equipment for retail players; and Jamendo, an independent music community with thousands of artists sharing a catalogue of approximately 500,000 tracks to stream or download for free. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Anderlecht, Belgium.
